filters.notes: 1998-09-02 as days_from_civil. Table sorted ascending. Zone map classifies each block as ALL_PASS (max_val <= 10471), MIXED (min_val <= 10471 < max_val), or SKIP (min_val > 10471). ~597 ALL_PASS, ~1 MIXED, ~2-3 SKIP.

scan.madvise: call madvise(MADV_SEQUENTIAL | MADV_WILLNEED) and madvise(MADV_HUGEPAGE) on every mmap'd column immediately after mapping, before the parallel scan

data_structures.block_classification: enum BlockType { ALL_PASS=0, MIXED=1, SKIP=2 } block_type[600] — classify each block from zone map during dim_filter phase
data_structures.aggregation: direct_array[6] of double-only Accum — thread-local per worker, merged after scan

parallelism.notes: static schedule: 600 blocks / nthreads gives contiguous chunks, lower overhead than dynamic; all blocks are equal size so load is balanced

indexes.purpose: block classification — ALL_PASS if max_val <= 10471, SKIP if min_val > 10471, MIXED otherwise. Early-terminate classification loop once min_val > 10471 (ascending sort order).

aggregation.accumulator_type: double for ALL fields — no long double anywhere

two_path_inner_loop.ALL_PASS_path: No shipdate pointer loaded. No branch on shipdate. Inner loop: compute idx = rf[i]*2 + ls[i]; acc[idx].sum_qty += qty[i]; acc[idx].sum_price += price[i]; double disc=disc[i]; acc[idx].sum_disc_price += price[i]*(1.0-disc); acc[idx].sum_charge += price[i]*(1.0-disc)*(1.0+tax[i]); acc[idx].sum_disc += disc; acc[idx].cnt++. Mark with __restrict__ and #pragma GCC ivdep or #pragma omp simd to encourage auto-vectorization.
two_path_inner_loop.MIXED_path: Load shipdate pointer. Inner loop with if (sd[i] > 10471) continue; Same accumulation in double.

aggregation.prefetch: Inside the inner loop body, add __builtin_prefetch(&qty[i + 64], 0, 0) (and similarly for price, disc, tax) to prefetch ~512 bytes ahead.
aggregation.merge: sum thread-local Acc[6] element-wise after scan; O(6 * nthreads)

output.format: use %.2f for sum_qty, sum_base_price, avg_qty, avg_price, avg_disc; use %.4f for sum_disc_price; use %.6f for sum_charge; use %ld for count_order — all double format specifiers (no Lf)

optimization_notes: Root cause (Category A + B): The iter_0 inner loop has two critical flaws that compound. First, it uses long double for sum_disc_price and sum_charge, forcing x87 FPU execution — this disables all SSE/AVX2 SIMD and runs at 1 op/instruction vs 4 with AVX2. Second, every row in every block incurs a shipdate read and a branch (if sd[i] > CUTOFF), even though 597 of 600 blocks are ALL_PASS (zone map max_val <= 10471) and need no per-row date check at all. The fix has two parts: (1) extend zone map classification to distinguish ALL_PASS / MIXED / SKIP blocks; for ALL_PASS blocks (99.8% of work), use a branchless inner loop that does not load l_shipdate, enabling the compiler to auto-vectorize with AVX2; (2) replace all long double accumulators with double, eliminating x87 and enabling 4-wide SIMD throughout. Additionally, madvise(SEQUENTIAL|WILLNEED|HUGEPAGE) is applied to all mmap'd columns to maximize hardware prefetch and eliminate TLB pressure from 4KB pages, and OpenMP schedule is changed from dynamic(4) to static for lower synchronization overhead.
